description_long: This is an irregularly shaped, medium-sized stone with a roughly triangular profile and a combination of smooth and jagged surfaces. The stone displays a natural beige to light brown coloration, with some areas appearing slightly darker due to surface texture and possible mineral inclusions. One side is relatively flat and smooth, while the opposite side is more angular and rugged, showing evidence of chipping or breakage. Small pits and surface imperfections are visible, suggesting natural weathering. The stone's mass and density are apparent from its solid, unbroken form, and it lacks any artificial markings or modifications aside from some faint writing. Its overall appearance suggests it could serve as a natural obstacle or barrier in an urban park or landscaped area.
description: A medium-sized, irregular beige stone with both smooth and jagged surfaces, showing signs of natural weathering and minor pitting. Its solid form and rough texture make it suitable as a natural barrier or landscape feature.
description_view_0: This view shows the stone's broadest, smoothest face with subtle pitting and a rounded edge.
description_view_1: This angle highlights the stone's jagged, angular side with a rough, broken texture and visible layering.
description_view_2: Here, the stone appears more pointed and narrow, emphasizing its sharp edges and rugged surface.
description_view_3: This view reveals a mix of smooth and rough surfaces, with faint writing visible and a slightly curved profile.
attribute_placement: set as a standalone feature on the ground
attribute_pattern: Irregular mottling and pitting with no distinct veining or artificial carvings; natural texture dominates.
attribute_weathering: Rough and pitted with minor surface erosion, indicating moderate exposure to natural elements.
attribute_integration_with_surroundings: Contrasts with manicured lawns or paved surfaces but can blend with other natural stones or planted areas.
